name: USS LCI(L)-1061 (LCI(L)-1061)
events: 13 Jan 1945 USS Charr (Cdr. F.D. Boyle, USN) departed Saipan for her patrol area. She was escorted out by USS LCI(L)-1061 (Lt. F.N. Geforth, USNR).
2 Feb 1945 USS Aspro (Cdr. W.A. Stevenson, USN) arrived at Saipan. She was escorted in by USS LCI(L)-1061.
3 Feb 1945 USS Aspro (Cdr. W.A. Stevenson, USN) departed Saipan for Pearl Harbor. She was escorted out by USS LCI(L)-1061.
8 Feb 1945 USS Bowfin (Cdr. A.K. Tyree, USN) departed Saipan for her patrol area. She was escorted out by USS LCI(L)-1061.
